scripts.orch:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development docker compose -f docker-compose.development.yml up --build -d
scripts.test:env:up: cross-env NODE_ENV=test docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up --build --remove-orphans -d postgres_test redis_test redis-insight_test localstack_test maildev_test
scripts.test:prepare: npm run test:env:up && npm run test:db:reset
scripts.test:auth: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:auth
scripts.test:users: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:users
scripts.test:workouts: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:workouts
scripts.test:bootstrap: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:bootstrap
scripts.test:messages: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:messages
scripts.test:aerobics: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:aerobics
scripts.test:analytics: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:analytics
scripts.test:exercises: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:exercises
scripts.test:oauth: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:oauth
scripts.test:push: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:push
scripts.test:all:run: npm run test:run:auth && npm run test:run:users && npm run test:run:workouts && npm run test:run:bootstrap && npm run test:run:messages && npm run test:run:aerobics && npm run test:run:analytics && npm run test:run:exercises && npm run test:run:oauth && npm run test:run:push && npm run test:run:videoanalysis && npm run test:run:websockets
scripts.test:all: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const run = (script) => spawnSync('npm', ['run', script], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }).status ?? 1; let code = run('test:prepare'); if (code === 0) code = run('test:all:run'); const downCode = run('test:env:down'); process.exit(code || downCode);"
scripts.test:videoanalysis: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:videoanalysis
scripts.test:websockets: npm run test:prepare && npm run test:run:websockets
